sequence.text: Primary Analyst position: The approach is sound. Evidence: standard engineering practice. [CONFIRMED] main point.
Critical Reviewer position: Risk identified — ensure rollback plan exists. [CONFIRMED] main point, [REFUTED] secondary risk.
Primary Analyst rebuttal: Rollback plan included in scope. [CONFIRMED] risk mitigation.
Critical Reviewer final: Satisfied with rollback commitment. Positions converged.
